svg.title: Professional Product Design Orchestrator system map
svg.desc: An eight-section system map. Inputs and governance feed a central AI agent orchestrator. The orchestrator requests and receives specialist skills, then coordinates a ten-step design lifecycle supported by reusable playbooks. Design-to-code execution and lifecycle validation feed quality gates, evidence feeds provenance, and learning loops refresh playbooks and earlier lifecycle stages.
svg.text: How the Professional Product Design Orchestrator Works
A governed AI-agent system for research, skill routing, delivery, validation, and evidence
Context enters as evidence, not assumptions.

g.text: Interprets context, enforces constraints, routes expertise, and coordinates delivery.
make assumptions explicit, keep decisions traceable, and escalate uncertainty.

svg.text: Acquire only when no safe match exists.
Matched to task, stage, stack, and risk.
No safe match in the local registry
Versioned assets reduce rework and preserve decisions.
Curated, versioned, and ready to reuse.
End-to-End Product Design and Delivery Lifecycle
Learnings refresh playbooks and earlier stages
One governed agent, routed expertise, reusable practice, verified delivery, and traceable evidence.
